name: DefinitionObserver
summary: This class is abstract. To implement this observer, create a Ruby class of this type, override the desired methods, and add an instance of the observer to the definitions of interests. This observer interface is implemented to react to component definition events.

methods.name: onComponentInstanceAdded
methods.summary: The #onComponentInstanceAdded method is called when a new component instance is added to a model.
methods.remarks: The #onComponentInstanceAdded method is called when a new component instance is added to a model.

params.name: definition
params.doc: The definition of the added instance

methods.name: onComponentInstanceRemoved
methods.summary: Note: Due to the underlying way that the SketchUp Move Tool is implemented, this method is fired on a Move + Copy operation even though no ComponentInstance is apparently removed.
methods.remarks: Note: Due to the underlying way that the SketchUp Move Tool is implemented, this method is fired on a Move + Copy operation even though no ComponentInstance is apparently removed. The #onComponentInstanceRemoved method is called when a component instance is removed from a model.

params.name: definition
params.doc: The definition of the instance removed
